def test_06_category_page_load(self):
        """IX-02: 分类页加载"""
        _go(self.mini.app, '/pages/category/category', 3)
        page = CategoryPage(self.mini)
        page.refresh_page()
        page.wait_loaded(timeout=10)

        cat_count = page.get_category_count()
        print(f'  分类数量: {cat_count}')
        self.assertGreater(cat_count, 0, '分类列表为空')
